introSection:
Divertical is a steel water roller coaster located at Mirabilandia in Savio, Emilia-Romagna, Italy. Opened in 2012, it is the tallest standing water roller coaster in the world, tied with Speed at Energylandia. The ride features a 59 metre (194 foot) tall structure, and 50 metre (164 foot) drop.

The ride was designed by Intamin and assembled by RCS GmbH.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 5 rows for a total of 10 riders per car.

fullText:
Divertical is a steel water roller coaster located at Mirabilandia in Savio, Emilia-Romagna, Italy. Opened in 2012, it is the tallest standing water roller coaster in the world, tied with Speed at Energylandia. The ride features a 59 metre (194 foot) tall structure, and 50 metre (164 foot) drop.

The ride was designed by Intamin and assembled by RCS GmbH.



Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 5 rows for a total of 10 riders per car.
